title: Generate pattern description via OpenRouter call when cluster crosses threshold
completion_summary: OpenRouter client with OpenAI and Anthropic provider support. Provider-switching via Config.Provider field: openrouter (Bearer auth, chat/completions), openai (same format), anthropic (x-api-key, /messages, system as top-level field). Prompt: 10 evenly-spaced cluster samples + cluster size context → LLM → single-line pattern description. 14 tests pass: all three providers, 401, no choices, empty content per provider, trim samples, defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Generates description like "Extract structured fields from customer emails"
OpenRouter API call succeeds with prompt built from cluster samples
